Compute composite scores and ranks; if needed, Call calculator for weighted sums
Select TOP 3–6 longs and BOTTOM 3–6 shorts meeting constraints (no tool)

subtasks.description: Write concise theses for each long with catalysts, valuation frame, target/conviction (no tool)

Call get_completion_analysis to check rigor, confidence, gaps
Call check_plan_completion_status to verify >=3 longs and >=3 shorts; resolve any gaps
If blocked, Call handle_task_failure(error_message=...) to recover and re-run missing steps

tasks.description: Formatting and final output (MANDATORY LAST SECTION)

subtasks.description: Format positions EXACTLY per JSON schema: [{ticker, position, thesis, key_drivers, key_risks, valuation_snapshot, conviction}] (no tool)
Final QA: use 'unknown' where data missing; no invented data; momentum rules honored (no tool)

execution_history.reason: Completed benchmark comparison and flagged relative value/quality to inform long/short diagnostics.

observations: Value benchmark: EV/EBIT 16.15x; EV/EBITDA 12.53x; Fwd P/E 18.47x; FCF yld 4.92%.
Overvalued vs bench: CHD (EV/EBIT 34.5x; EV/EBITDA 24.5x; Fwd P/E 27.7x), WDFC (EV/EBIT 29.0x; Fwd P/E 38.8x), CLX (EV/EBIT 20.4x; Fwd P/E 25.3x).
Discount vs bench: KMB (EV/EBIT 9.24x), REYN (EV/EBIT 12.9x; FCF yld ~6.9%), ENR (EV/EBITDA 8.9x; P/E ~9.5x), SPB (EV/EBITDA 9.4x; P/S 0.49x).

Quality/risk flags: ENR leverage high (net debt/EBITDA ~12.5x; Altman Z ~0.85). SPB low ROIC (~1%) and high vol. CLX leverage elevated; working capital negative; momentum negative. KMB margins recovering; pulp down y/y supports tissue margins.
Momentum contrarian: ENR +48% 3m (be cautious); SPB -39% 1y (deep value); CLX -21% 1y (still rich); WDFC -17% 1y with rich multiple; REYN -26% 1y with high FCF yld.

execution_history.reason: Diagnosed candidates consistent with benchmarks, input-cost cycles, and quality/momentum screens.

observations: Preliminary longs: KMB (pulp tailwind, valuation discount, margins inflecting), REYN (discount, strong FCF, resin manageable; recovery candidate), ENR (deep value; FCF; watch leverage/vol), PG or CL (quality compounders; mild de-rate but resilient; choose 1).
Preliminary shorts: CHD (rich multiple, slowing growth; momentum weak), WDFC (peak-like multiple vs slowing growth; low FCF yld), CLX (still rich with leverage and category pressure).
Alternates: SPB (speculative long on restructuring; high vol); ODC/CENT excluded for liquidity? ODC low liquidity; CENT very low ADMV.

execution_history.reason: Defined weights to compute composite ranks balancing value, quality, catalysts with risk and liquidity adjustments.

observations: Scoring weights: Valuation 25%, Growth trajectory 15%, Quality 20%, Momentum contrarian 10%, Risk/leverage -10% (penalty), Liquidity 10%, Catalysts 20%

execution_history.reason: Weights locked; moving to ranking and selection.

observations: Proceeding to 8b: compute composite ranks using defined weights; focus on valuation discount vs benchmarks, quality/ROIC, catalysts (input-cost tailwinds, reformulation readiness), momentum contrarian, risk/leverage penalties, liquidity.

execution_history.reason: Selected balanced long/short baskets meeting constraints and aligned with input-cost cycle, regulatory/compliance headwinds, channel dynamics, and valuation vs benchmarks.

observations: Composite scoring and ranking finalized using weights: Valuation 25%, Growth trajectory 15%, Quality 20%, Momentum contrarian 10%, Risk/leverage -10%, Liquidity 10%, Catalysts 20%.

Top Longs: 1) KMB (cheap EV/EBIT ~9.24x; pulp tailwind; margins inflecting; dividend ~3.9%), 2) REYN (EV/EBIT ~12.9x; FCF yld ~6.9%; recovery setup; resin manageable), 3) CL (quality/ROIC ~10.7%; FCF yld ~4.9%; 1Y pullback offers entry). Alt: PG (quality; modest upside).

Top Shorts: 1) CHD (EV/EBIT ~34.5x; Fwd P/E ~27.7x; ROIC ~3.5%; weak momentum; promo intensity risk), 2) WDFC (EV/EBIT ~29.0x; Fwd P/E ~38.8x; FCF yld ~2.8%; growth decel), 3) CLX (EV/EBIT ~20.4x; Fwd P/E ~25.3x; leverage/working-cap negative; disinfecting claim upkeep costs).

Liquidity filter: Excluded CENT and ODC from core baskets due to low dollar volume; ENR excluded from long basket due to distress metrics (net debt/EBITDA >12x, Altman Z ~0.85) despite cheap valuation and recent squeeze.

execution_history.reason: Move into drafting investment cases with concrete drivers/risks/valuation snapshots aligned to tool data and knowledge base.

observations: Prepared draft theses for 3 longs (KMB, REYN, CL) and 3 shorts (CHD, WDFC, CLX) based on factor benchmarks, fundamentals, risk metrics, and input-cost cycle context.

execution_history.reason: Composite scoring completed and ranks established to select top 3 longs (KMB, REYN, CL) and bottom 3 shorts (CHD, WDFC, CLX).

observations: 1) KMB – EV/EBIT ~9.2x (<bench 16.1x), dividend ~3.9%, pulp down y/y aids tissue margins; FCF strong; quality improving
2) REYN – EV/EBIT ~12.9x (<bench), FCF yld ~6.9% (>bench 4.9%), resin manageable; recovery candidate
3) CL – EV/EBIT ~17.4x (~bench+), FCF yld ~4.9% (=bench), high quality/ROIC, pullback entry
4) PG – EV/EBIT ~17.4x (~bench+), quality leader; steady FCF; modest upside
5) ENR – Cheap (EV/EBITDA ~8.9x; P/E ~9.5x) but leverage/Altman Z weak; high vol
6) SPB – Value (EV/EBITDA ~9.4x; P/S 0.49x) but very low ROIC (~1%), high vol; mixed cash flow history
7) ODC – Strong TR 1Y +106%, but low liquidity; momentum extended; skip
8) CENT – Liquidity very low; mixed fundamentals; skip
9) CLX – Rich (EV/EBIT ~20.4x; fwd P/E ~25.3x); leverage elevated; negative momentum; disinfecting claim cost moat but burden
10) CHD – Very rich (EV/EBIT ~34.5x; fwd P/E ~27.7x); growth slowing; weak momentum
11) WDFC – Very rich (EV/EBIT ~29.0x; fwd P/E ~38.8x); FCF yld ~2.8%; growth decel

execution_history.reason: Meets constraint of ≥3 longs and ≥3 shorts with liquidity and volatility screens; aligned to factor benchmarks and category input-cost dynamics.

observations: Selected Longs (3): KMB, REYN, CL. Alternates/bench: PG as 4th optional long if needed.
Selected Shorts (3): CHD, WDFC, CLX. Alternates: None needed; ENR/SPB avoided due to risk and liquidity considerations for longs; ODC/CENT excluded for liquidity.

execution_history.reason: Ready to produce final recommendations per JSON schema.

observations: Drafting investment cases for: Longs—KMB, REYN, CL; Shorts—CHD, WDFC, CLX. Will include thesis, drivers, risks, valuation snapshots using tool metrics (EV/EBIT vs 16.1x bench; FCF yld vs 4.92% bench; leverage/Altman Z; ROIC; input-cost exposures).
